title: Craftable Ink Sacs
description: Adds two simple crafting recipes: for Ink Sacs and Glow Ink Sacs
body: Adds two simple crafting recipes: for Ink Sacs (4 being crafted from 4 black dye, string and a slimeball) and Glow Ink Sacs (4 being crafted from 1 glow ink sac, 3 glowstone dust, string and a slimeball)
